author: Student
content: Just completed the RAG pipeline module in the GenAI course — the vector embedding section was really well explained. Highly recommend!

author: Priya M.
content: Anyone else struggling with the Kubernetes networking module? Would love to form a study group for the assignments.

author: Rahul Verma
content: Office hours this Friday at 4 PM IST for AWS Cloud Foundations. Bring your questions on EC2, VPC, and IAM policies!

author: Ankit J.
content: Passed the AWS Foundations certification exam today with a 93% score! Thanks to the Xebia course material and practice quizzes.

author: Neha Patel
content: New module released: Advanced React Patterns including compound components and render props. Check it out in the course!
